results.rendered_html:
rathyā
1 A road for carriages; (hence) a high-way, main road; bhūyo bhūyaḥ savidhanagarīrathyayā paryaṭaṃtaṃ  Māl. 1. 15. 
2 A place where many roads meet.
3 A number of carriages or chariots;  Śi. 18. 3.
